allow: Bash(awk '/\\/\\* latin \\*\\//{getline; while\($0 !~ /}/\){print; getline}}' /tmp/is.css | grep -o "https[^\)]*\\|font-style: [a-z]*" ; echo ===; awk '/\\/\\* latin \\*\\//{getline; while\($0 !~ /}/\){print; getline}}' /tmp/jbm.css | grep -o "https[^\)]*\\|font-style: [a-z]*")
Bash(sed -i "s/const EDITOR_BG = { dark: '#0D0D12', light: '#E8E8E8' };/const EDITOR_BG = { dark: '#0C0F11', light: '#E8EBEB' };/" main.js)
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process electron,Lumshot -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-Date")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Name electron -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; \(Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object MainWindowTitle | Select-Object Id,MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
